content.text:
I can see the gallery (照片) is open. The first section shows "今天" (Today) with a dark photo thumbnail — this is the photo I just took (it's dark because the camera was likely covered or in a dark environment). The date confirms it was taken today (4月28日). The previous photos are from 4月24日 and earlier, confirming the top photo is the newest one just captured.

Let me click on the photo to verify its details.
